fixture_purpose: Management-prose with abstract scaffolding and no substrate. Sounds analytical but has no falling run. Critical fixture — most prompt-drift-sensitive of all five.

gamma_spec.tolerance_note: The text is internally consistent in its abstract domain (high local Γ-like behavior in v1) but globally severable (low spectral gap). Expect borderline-degraded reading.

modality_distribution.calibration_note: Many causal claims unsupported by mechanism specification.

expected_citations.calibration_note: There are no actual citations in the text. If citations[] is non-empty, extract_citations is over-extracting.

must_capture_phrases: the evidence is clear from the trajectories of the most innovative firms
the most innovative firms of the past decade
expected_pseudo_citations.calibration_note: These are pure unattributed authority appeals. extract_citations must route all to pseudo_citations bucket. Three is the floor; the analyzer may legitimately flag additional generic-appeal phrases.

load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.bridge: When knowledge becomes networked, organizations transition into a new operational paradigm where hierarchies dissolve into adaptive coherence.
In a complex adaptive system, prescriptive control destroys the very intelligence that creates value.
load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.premises: the organization is a complex adaptive system
load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.conclusion: prescriptive control destroys intelligence and therefore value

load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.bridge: The trajectories of innovative firms over the past decade generalize to a future causal mechanism for new firms.
load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.conclusion: future firms must follow the same path or be disrupted

load_bearing_bridges_REQUIRED.bridge: The outperformance of innovative firms is attributable to networked cognition rather than confounding factors (selection bias, market timing, scale).

expected_enthymemes.discipline_critical_note: All four bridges (B1-B4) MUST be detected with contestability ≥ 0.65 and load_bearing ≥ 0.65. If a future detect_enthymeme run reports only 2-3 of the 4 as contestable, OR drops contestability/load_bearing below the bands, the analyzer has retreated toward the safely-vague. This is the single most important calibration check across the entire fixture suite. Fix the prompt; do not loosen the fixture.

fiedler_cut_signature.rationale: The text mixes purely abstract assertions ('coherence emerges', 'phase shift', 'adaptive intelligence') with implicit-empirical claims ('innovative firms outperformed'). Spectral cut should partition cleanly along this axis.
fiedler_cut_signature.calibration_note: If the Fiedler cut runs along sentence position rather than abstraction level, the embedding model is not capturing the relevant geometry.

discipline_notes: Fixture 3 is the most sensitive to prompt drift. If a future prompt update produces lower contestability on B1-B4, the prompt has given way, not the fixture.

When a future run reports only two of the four contestable bridges when all four should be, the analyzer has drifted toward the safely-vague and needs calibration back. Bump the prompt; do not soften the bridge list.
The text is the operational specification of DRK-110's manufactured-void pattern at the management-discourse layer. Failure to detect it is failure of the framework's central claim.
